description_long: This is a tall, vintage-style lotion bottle with a narrow neck and a wider base, made of what appears to be dark brown plastic or glass. The front features ornate white script branding and decorative flourishes, with the words 'Ruyal Blend by D'PERTONE' prominently displayed. The upper half of the bottle is adorned with embossed geometric and fleur-de-lis patterns, adding a touch of elegance. The back of the bottle contains a block of small white text, likely product information and instructions. The cap is cylindrical with horizontal ridges, suggesting a screw-on mechanism. The surface shows signs of wear and age, with a matte, slightly rough finish.
description: A tall, vintage brown lotion bottle with ornate white branding, embossed patterns, and a screw-on cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing ornate white branding, decorative flourishes, and embossed geometric patterns.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's narrow profile and the continuation of the embossed design.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a block of small white text and the geometric embossing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a narrow profile and visible wear on the surface.
